intro.body: Participants face the experts in a raw, unfiltered environment. No safety nets. Just your idea, your voice, and the jury's verdict. Between the battles, experts drop knowledge bombs to arm you for the real world.

features.title: Pitch Your Project
features.desc: 3-minute intense pitch to a panel of experts. Make it count.

features.title: The Jury
features.desc: Experts sit in a semicircle. Immediate, unfiltered feedback.

features.title: Masterclasses
features.desc: Short, intensive lectures sharing the exact advice pitchers need.

features.title: Secure The Prize
features.desc: One winner takes points for master's admission. Survival of the fittest.

items.name: Renowned Artist
items.desc: How I Failed Before I Succeeded. Raw, honest talk about the gap between a creative idea and market reality.

items.name: Financial Consultant
items.desc: How to Calculate Your Hourly Rate & Not Go Broke. Budgeting for creative people.

items.name: Kim Elena
items.role: Head of Partner Comms, Gazprom Neft
items.desc: The PR Factor: How to Talk to Partners and the Press. Crafting a narrative that attracts sponsors.

items.name: Guest Expert
items.desc: Providing critical feedback and industry insights during the pitch sessions.

items.title: Check-in & Name Tags
items.desc: Participants arrive. Project teams receive timeslot badges.

items.title: Opening Ceremony
items.desc: Organizer welcomes everyone. Rules explained. Experts introduced.

items.title: PITCH BLOCK 1
items.desc: 3 project teams pitch (7 min each + 10-15 min Q&A).

items.title: Lecture 1: The Reality Check
items.desc: How I Failed Before I Succeeded. By Renowned Artist.

items.title: PITCH BLOCK 2
items.desc: 3 project teams pitch to the experts.

items.title: Lecture 2: The Numbers Don't Lie
items.desc: Budgeting for creative people. By Financial Consultant.

items.title: PITCH BLOCK 3
items.desc: Final group of project teams pitch.

items.title: Lecture 3: Selling the Story
items.desc: The PR Factor. By Kim Elena (Gazprom Neft).

items.title: THE FINALE
items.desc: Experts deliberate. Winner announcement. Feedback forms.
